alerts.item: 250 ingredients show negative stock — one root cause
alerts.detail: Goods receipts aren't being posted in Odoo, so stock was never added while sales kept consuming. Your inventory isn't live yet — confirm/receive your purchase orders to turn on real-time stock and variance tracking.
